data.name: Locked in Temptation
data.detailed_description:
What starts as a simple job to pay the rent pulls you into a world of secrets, relationships, and personal growth. As you clean the backyard of your landlady’s boss, you uncover hidden truths, forge connections with compelling women, and face tough choices that shape your journey.



Build trust, explore romance, and navigate intrigue in this choice-driven adult Visual Novel. Your actions determine the relationships you build, the mysteries you unravel, and the unique ending to your story. Will you rise to the challenge or let it slip away? The choice is yours.

Features:


  • High-quality graphics
  • ~1.000 images
  • 70+ Animations
  • 2-4 hours of game (for multiple playthroughs)
  • An engaging mystery
  • Lewd scenes with various girls
  • Scene gallery
  • Multiple playthroughs

Locked in Temptation contains graphic sexual content, including:


  • Oral Sex
  • Anal Sex
  • Vaginal Sex
  • Masturbation
  • Voyeurism
  • Teasing
  • Cumshots
  • Facial
  • Exhibitionism
  • Creampies

Player discretion is strongly advised.

You can expect a 2- to 4-hour game that you can replay a few times to experience different paths and girls.

data.short_description: Locked in Temptation is a choice-driven adult Visual Novel. Unravel the web of intrigue that threatens everything. Romance captivating women, uncover betrayals, and embrace your transformation in this thrilling blend of drama, intrigue, and sex.

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10
  • 處理器: Intel Core 2 Duo
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 2.0 or DirectX 9.0c compatible
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0c
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間
